creator: marcus@dankesuper.de
text:
Hi,
when trying to install talloc:

talloc-2.3.4_1 conflicts with samba419-4.19.6 on /usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/talloc.cpython-39.so

I'd like to install Freeradius3, which depends on talloc, but Freeradius is also needing Samba because the authentication should be done against an Windows AD.

Thanks in advance
Marcus
